column1: # grep-tells.tsv — TIER 1 (flat-presence) rules for audit-swiftui-localization (loc-01 … loc-10).
# severity: hard | warn | adv   (hard -> runner exits 2). The runner greps each ERE over the target *.swift.
# This LOCATES only — the LLM agent READS each hit (SKILL.md step 3) and decides. The non-literal-Text
# case (loc-02) is structural -> ast-grep/loc-02-nonliteral-text.yml. loc-04 (no .xcstrings) is a project
# file check in ORIENT; loc-05/loc-09 are READ-judgment (no reliable regex). Full ❌→✅: ../references/*.md.

column4: verbatim: opts OUT of localization — if the literal is human-readable UI copy, drop verbatim: so it auto-localizes (loc-01); if a brand/version/number, it is correct
legacy NSLocalizedString macro -> a literal LocalizedStringKey or String(localized:) (loc-03); also flag api-currency cross_ref
UI sentence built by interpolation inside a Text literal -> no pluralization/grammar agreement; move variants into the String Catalog (loc-06)
locale-unaware display formatting -> use a FormatStyle / .formatted() with the environment locale (loc-07)
directional SF Symbol does not mirror in RTL -> prefer the semantic .backward/.forward symbols that flip (loc-08)
hard-coded horizontal offset/position assumes LTR -> will not mirror in RTL; derive from layoutDirection (loc-10)
